mapper.select: select count(*) from member where login_id=#{loginId}
select count(*) from member where nickname=#{nickname}
mapper.insert: insert into member_local_auth( username, password_hash, password_updated_at, failed_login_count, member_id ) values(#{username}, #{passwordHash}, sysdate(), 0, #{memberId})
mapper.select: select local_auth.username AS username, local_auth.member_id AS memberId, local_auth.password_hash AS passwordHash, local_auth.failed_login_count AS failedLoginCount, local_auth.locked_until AS lockedUntil, case when local_auth.locked_until is not null and local_auth.locked_until > now() then 1 else 0 end AS currentlyLocked from member_local_auth local_auth inner join member member_info on member_info.member_id = local_auth.member_id where local_auth.username = #{username} and member_info.member_status = 'ACTIVE' and member_info.deleted_at is null limit 1 for update
mapper.update: update member_local_auth set failed_login_count = 5, locked_until = date_add(now(), interval 5 minute) where username = #{username}
update member_local_auth set failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = null where username = #{username}
mapper.select: select * from email_verification where email = #{email} and purpose = #{purpose} order by email_verification_id desc limit 1 for update
select * from email_verification where email = #{email} and purpose = 'FIND_PASSWORD' and member_id = #{memberId} order by email_verification_id desc limit 1 for update
select count(*) from email_verification where created_at >= date_sub(now(), interval 1 day)
mapper.update: update email_verification set verified_at = now() where email_verification_id = #{emailVerificationId} and verified_at is null
mapper.select: select member_info.member_id from member member_info inner join member_local_auth local_auth on local_auth.member_id = member_info.member_id where local_auth.username = #{username} and member_info.email = #{email} and member_info.member_status = 'ACTIVE' and member_info.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update email_verification set consumed_at = now() where email_verification_id = #{emailVerificationId} and member_id = #{memberId} and purpose = 'FIND_PASSWORD' and verified_at is not null and consumed_at is null

update member_local_auth local_auth inner join member member_info on member_info.member_id = local_auth.member_id set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_updated_at = now(), failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = null where local_auth.member_id = #{memberId} and member_info.member_status = 'ACTIVE' and member_info.deleted_at is null
mapper.select: select login_id from member where name=#{name} and email=#{email} and member_status='ACTIVE' and deleted_at IS NULL
